questionHtml: Without doing any further calculations, explain briefly how you would carry out a test, at the 5% significance level, to decide if the data can be modelled by B(6, p ), where p  is unspecified.
markschemeHtml:
Estimate p  from the data which would entail the loss of one degree of freedom      A1A1

[2 marks]
